narration_text: As you get ready to face the zombies, you feel a mix of fear and adrenaline. You've managed to defend your supplies and escape through exit 1 before, but this time you're prepared for the challenge ahead. The undead are closing in, their groans and moans growing louder with every passing moment. You grip your basic supplies and first aid kit tightly, ready to take on the horde. Your heart is racing as you prepare to engage in the most crucial battle of your survival so far.

dialogue.speaker: Sinbad
dialogue.text: Alright, zombies, let's settle this once and for all.

dialogue.speaker: Sinbad
dialogue.text: I've got my supplies, I've got my wits, and I've got a plan. It's time to take down these unwanted visitors.

characters.name: Sinbad
memories: escapes zombie horde in starting area with minimal damage
characters.backstory: Sinbad is a young survivor trying to make his way in a world overrun by the undead.

current_inventory.name: basic supplies
current_inventory.description: A mysterious item named basic supplies.

current_inventory.name: first aid kit
current_inventory.description: A mysterious item named first aid kit.

history_entry: You successfully defended your supplies against the zombie horde in the starting area, suffering minor injuries but managing to emerge victorious. Your supplies are safe for now, but you know there are more zombies out there waiting to be dealt with.

world_info.name: The Walking Dead
world_info.description: Survive in a world overrun by zombies.
